mapper.sql: SELECT w.widget_id AS id, w.owner_user_id AS userId, w.name AS name, w.dataset_id AS datasetId, d.datasource_id AS datasourceId, w.chart_type AS chartType, w.options_json AS optionsJson, w.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, u.user_name AS userName, w.created_at AS createTime, w.updated_at AS updateTime FROM ib_widget w LEFT JOIN ib_user u ON u.user_id = w.owner_user_id LEFT JOIN ib_category c ON c.category_id = w.category_id LEFT JOIN ib_dataset d ON d.dataset_id = w.dataset_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ib_widget (owner_user_id, name, dataset_id, category_id, chart_type, options_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{datasetId}, #{categoryId}, #{chartType}, #{optionsJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE ib_widget SET name = #{name}, dataset_id = #{datasetId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, chart_type = #{chartType}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE widget_id = #{id}
